heading: Salaries of district judges
label: 135 Salaries of district judges
text: Each judge of a district court of the United States shall receive a salary at an annual rate determined under section 225 of the Federal Salary Act of 1967 (), as adjusted by .2 U.S.C. 351–361section 461 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 5, and District of Columbia Code, 1940 ed., § 11–302 (, ; , ; , ; , ; , ).Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 236 Stat. 1087Feb. 25, 1919, ch. 29, § 140 Stat. 1156Dec. 13, 1926, ch. 644 Stat. 919May 17, 1932, ch. 19047 Stat. 158July 31, 1946, ch. 704, § 160 Stat. 716Section consolidates , U.S.C., 1940 ed., and section 11–302 of the District of Columbia Code, 1940 ed.section 5 of title 28“Chief judge,” in the District of Columbia, was substituted for “Chief Justice” which appeared in section 11–302 of the District of Columbia Code. (See reviser’s note under .)section 136 of this titleWords “to be paid in monthly installments” were omitted, since the time of payment is a matter of administrative convenience. See 20 Comp. Gen. 834.The provision of , U.S.C., 1940 ed., for salaries of judges of the district court of Alaska was omitted as covered by , U.S.C., 1940 ed., Territories and Insular Possessions, as amended by a separate section in the bill to enact this revised title. The provision of said section for salary of the Virgin Islands district judge was omitted as covered by , U.S.C., 1940 ed., as amended by a separate section in the bill to enact this revised title. Such section 5a is recommended for transfer to title 48, U.S.C., 1940 ed., because of the dual nature of the Virgin Islands district court.section 5 of title 28section 101 of Title 48section 5a of title 28For salary of the district judge of Canal Zone district court, see , U.S.C., 1940 ed., Territories and Insular Possessions.section 1348 of title 48Changes were made in phraseology.

References in TextSection 225 of the Federal Salary Act of 1967, referred to in text, is , , , which is classified to chapter 11 (§ 351 et seq.) of Title 2, The Congress.section 225 of Pub. L. 90–20681 Stat. 642Dec. 16, 1967

Amendments1975— substituted provision that each judge of a district court shall receive a salary at an annual rate determined under section 225 of the Federal Salary Act of 1967, as adjusted by , for provision that each such judge receive a salary of $30,000.Pub. L. 94–82section 461 of this title1964— increased the salary of the district court judges from $22,500 to $30,000, and that of the chief judge of the District Court for the District of Columbia from $23,000 to $30,500.Pub. L. 88–4261955—Act , increased the salaries of the district court judges from $15,000 to $22,500 a year and increased the salary of the chief judge of the District Court for the District of Columbia from $15,500 to $23,000 a year.Mar. 2, 1955

Effective Date of 1964 AmendmentAmendment by effective on the first day of the first pay period which begins on or after , except to the extent provided in , see .Pub. L. 88–426section 501(c) of Pub. L. 88–426section 501 of Pub. L. 88–426July 1, 1964
Effective Date of 1955 AmendmentAmendment by act , effective , see section 5 of act , set out as a note under , The Congress.Mar. 2, 1955Mar. 1, 1955Mar. 2, 1955section 4501 of Title 2

Salary IncreasesFor adjustment of salaries of district judges under this section, see the executive order detailing the adjustment of certain rates of pay set out as a note under , Government Organization and Employees.section 5332 of Title 5For prior year salary increases per the recommendation of the President, see Prior Salary Recommendations notes under , The Congress.section 358 of Title 2For miscellaneous provisions dealing with adjustments of pay and limitations on use of funds to pay salaries in prior years, see notes under , Government Organization and Employees.section 5318 of Title 5Salary of chief judge of District Court for District of Columbia increased from $10,500 to $15,500 a year, and salaries of all other district court judges increased from $10,000 to $15,000 a year by , .act July 31, 1946, ch. 704, § 160 Stat. 716Salary of chief judge of District Court of District of Columbia increased from $7,500 to $10,500 a year, and salaries of all other district court judges increased from $7,500 to $10,000 a year by , .act Dec. 13, 1926, ch. 6, § 144 Stat. 919Salaries of district court judges increased from $6,000 to $7,500 a year by , .act Feb. 25, 1919, ch. 29, § 140 Stat. 1156Salaries of chief justice and associate justices of Supreme Court of District of Columbia, forerunner of District Court for District of Columbia, were set at $5,000 by , , and increased to $7,500 a year by , .act Mar. 3, 1901, ch. 854, § 130 Stat. 1199act Feb. 25, 1919, ch. 29, § 140 Stat. 1156Salaries of district court judges set at $6,000 a year by Judicial Code of 1911, , .act Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 136 Stat. 1087
